title: huparcho #5225
definition:
1) to begin below, to make a beginning
    1a) to begin
 2) to come forth, hence to be there, be ready, be at hand
 3) to be
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to begin below, to make a beginning
    1a) to begin
 2) to come forth, hence to be there, be ready, be at hand
 3) to be

    NASB:  to begin, to be ready or at hand, to be:
